name: First Last
headline: CTO · CIO · Technology-Focused COO
summary: Executive technology leader with 25+ years of experience driving enterprise digital transformation, cloud modernization, cybersecurity, and post-M&A integration across regulated and high-growth environments. Leverages deep technical expertise and emerging technologies—including AI and ML automation—to enable scalable growth and operational excellence through modern IT operating models, cost optimization, and scalable platforms. A trusted advisor to the C-suite and board, builds high-performing teams, bridges business and technology, and is known for stabilizing complex environments, scaling platforms, and preparing organizations for growth or exit.

competencies.title: Executive Leadership & Digital Transformation
bullets: Drive enterprise digital transformation and culture change
Strategic, hands-on leader focused on execution and measurable outcomes
Build high-performing, cross-functional global teams aligned to strategy

competencies.title: Cloud, Infrastructure & IT Modernization
bullets: Deep expertise in cloud and hybrid architecture, migrations, operations (AWS, Azure)
Led large-scale infrastructure modernization improving scalability, resilience, cost efficiency
Data-driven leader leveraging analytics, automation, AI/ML

competencies.title: Cybersecurity, Risk & Compliance
bullets: Led cybersecurity, privacy, and compliance (HITRUST, HIPAA, SOC 2, Zero Trust)
Led audit readiness, risk management, and security governance
Oversaw SOC operations, vulnerability management, and security awareness

competencies.title: Mergers & Acquisitions
bullets: Led technology due-diligence and integration strategy for 9 acquisitions
Executed rapid post-merger integration and systems consolidation
Drove change management to achieve cost synergies and operational efficiency

competencies.title: Operational Excellence & Financial Management
bullets: Optimized operations through process redesign, automation, consolidation
Designed and operated highly available platforms achieving 99.999% uptime
Managed multi-million-dollar IT budgets, enterprise vendors, third-party risk

competencies.title: Enterprise Technology & Network Architecture
bullets: Enterprise Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery (BCDR) across environments
Broad technical depth across systems, storage, virtualization, operations
Deployed and scaled secure voice and data networks

experience.title: Job Title 1
experience.context: Healthcare technology — AI-enabled clinical platforms, EHR modernization.

stats.label: Scope
stats.value: Systems, Storage, Network, Development, Data Strategy

achievements: Delivered a next-generation, AI-powered Electronic Health Record (EHR) system leveraging Microsoft Co-Pilot, enabling real-time clinical decision support and documentation automation; reduced provider charting time by 40% and significantly improved data accuracy across clinical workflows.

Designed and implemented a machine learning-driven NMS solution that analyzed historical performance data to proactively predict and prevent infrastructure failures, reducing downtime by 50% and increasing NPS by streamlining operations through targeted proactive alerts.
Fostered a goal-oriented, lead-by-example culture that boosted productivity by 50% and reduced turnover through trust, mentorship, recognition, and career-pathing initiatives.

experience.title: Job Title 2
experience.context: Growth-stage operator — multi-site consolidation, exit via acquisition.
achievements: Implemented and consolidated multiple Tier IV datacenters across geographically dispersed sites with a unified architecture and operating model that reduced operational costs by 30%, improved redundancy, and enabled scalable infrastructure growth across the enterprise.

Led cross-functional steering committee to consolidate fragmented and unreliable telecommunications systems by standardizing on Microsoft Teams Voice, resulting in a 70% reduction in telecom spend and improved cross-site reliability, interoperability, and coverage.

Led post-acquisition tech-debt consolidation across multiple business units by standardizing and stabilizing critical legacy applications; reduced unplanned downtime by 95%, boosted order-fulfillment performance, and positioned IT for scalable integration and future transformation.

experience.title: Job Title 3
experience.context: Nationwide acute-care SaaS — HITRUST-certified, IPO outcome.

stats.label: Scope
stats.value: NOC, Network, Systems, Field Ops, Development

achievements: Designed and led end-to-end implementation of a 24×7×365 SaaS platform supporting nationwide acute care services that enabled rapid growth and directly supported the company's 200% revenue growth and successful IPO.

Led design, implementation, and validation of enterprise-wide business continuity and disaster recovery plans meeting HIPAA and HITRUST requirements, resulting in a 40% improvement in RTO/RPO metrics and sustained 99.999% uptime across critical infrastructure.

Played a key role in achieving HITRUST compliance by assessing infrastructure gaps, implementing security controls, and leading cross-functional remediation efforts — annual certification with zero critical findings and improved audit readiness across the organization.

experience.title: Job Title 4
experience.context: Carrier-grade operations — hybrid cloud transformation, process automation.
achievements: Led executive steering committee through a $2M cloud transformation to AWS and Azure, aligning finance, operations, and security teams to ensure enterprise buy-in and adoption — reduced support costs by 30% and improved system scalability and disaster-recovery capabilities.

Led a company-wide SOP transformation and automation initiative that standardized order-provisioning workflows; reduced provisioning times by 30% and cut post-installation troubleshooting by 50% through process reengineering, system integration, and targeted automation.

experience.title: Job Title 5
experience.context: Early-stage VoIP/PBX platform — product leadership, Series A.
achievements: Product visionary leading development of a scalable hybrid VoIP/PBX platform and aligning go-to-market strategy — the cornerstone of the company's 40% YoY revenue growth strategy and directly supported a $25M Series A funding round.

Led a strategic cost-consolidation initiative to rehome over 2,000 customer and backhaul circuits to optimized Points of Presence (PoPs); achieved complete operational transparency and minimized customer impact while delivering $275K in annual savings and improving network efficiency.

Redesigned legacy billing systems by implementing automated provisioning and activation workflows, enabling real-time billing and reducing manual errors; uncovered and corrected $350K in unbilled revenue through audit and system modernization.

projects.title: Migrated from DUO to Entra ID

additional.label: Clearance
additional.value: Background clear; able to obtain clearance as needed
